name: Struffoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the eggs, butter, and 1 1/2 cups sugar until foamy.
2. Sift flour with baking powder and stir into the egg mixture.
3. With your hands, work the mixture into a soft dough.
4. Divide the dough into 4 pieces.
5. On a floured surface, roll each piece into a rope about the width of your index finger and 12 inches long.
6. Cut the ropes into 1-inch pieces.
7. Toss the pieces with enough flour to dust them lightly, and shake off the excess flour.
8. Heat vegetable oil in a deep fryer or high saucepan to 375°F (190°C).
9. Fry struffoli a few at a time until puffed up and golden brown. Transfer to paper towel to drain using a slotted spoon.
10. In a large saucepan, combine honey and remaining 1/2 cup sugar; heat over low heat, stirring, until the sugar has dissolved. Keep warm over low heat.
11. Add fried balls a few at a time, turning with a wooden spoon to coat on all sides.
12. Transfer balls to a large plate and mound into a pyramid, shaping with wet hands.
13. Sprinkle with colored sprinkles and let stand for 1 to 2 hours before serving by breaking off pieces with your hands.
